top_findings.summary: The skill description instructs to "Search the ./canvas-fonts directory" and "Download and use whatever fonts are needed" without specifying security boundaries or consent mechanisms. While fonts are relevant to design creation, unrestricted file system access (searching arbitrary directories) and uncontrolled network downloads (without specifying trusted sources or obtaining user consent) pose security risks and exceed the minimal permissions needed for a design generation tool. The skill should either use a predefined set of fonts, request explicit user approval for downloads, or operate within a sandboxed environment.
